ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the accident occurred */,
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Case number assigned to the accident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., minor, major, fatal) */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* The local or state jurisdiction where the accident occurred */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* The name or ID of the person who reported the accident */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the accident report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of record creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the vehicle is involved in */,
  "vehicle_number" INTEGER /* Vehicle number in the report */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* The license plate number of the vehicle */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* The name of the insurance company */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* The insurance policy number */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* The type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "damage_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the damage to the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the participant is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "injury_level" TEXT /* Level of injury sustained by the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the participant */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* The driver's license number of the participant */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the vehicle the participant was in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impairments" (
  "impairment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impairment record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "impairment_type" TEXT /* Type of impairment (e.g., alcohol, drugs, fatigue) */,
  "is_impaired" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant was impaired (true/false) */,
  "impairment_level" TEXT /* The level of impairment (e.g., slight, moderate, severe) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* The results of impairment tests (e.g., blood alcohol content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impairment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impairments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident the witness observed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the witness */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement or description from the witness */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the witness */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident related to this location */,
  "road_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the road at the time of the accident (e.g., wet, dry) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the accident (e.g., clear, foggy) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the accident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the accident location */,
  "intersection_type" TEXT /* The type of intersection (e.g., four-way, T-intersection) */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* The type of road (e.g., highway, street, rural road) */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* The lighting conditions at the time of the accident (e.g., daylight, twilight, dark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident related to this report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., preliminary, final, statistical) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state name */,
  "capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or unit the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the user accessed the system (e.g., city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplementary_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accident related to this document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., photo, witness statement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* The size of the uploaded document in bytes */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplementary_documents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplementary_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_accidents" INTEGER /* Total number of accidents reported */,
  "fatal_accidents" INTEGER /* Total number of fatal accidents */,
  "injury_accidents" INTEGER /* Total number of accidents with injuries */,
  "total_property_damage" REAL /* The total property damage caused by accidents */,
  "total_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* The total number of vehicles involved in accidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)
